text:
Created attachment 221315
SVN diff

Port for https://github.com/mate-desktop/python-caja.  I used deskutils/caja-extensions as the template to create this.

- Passes portlint
- Tested with poudriere for 12.2 and 11.4 amd64. i386 is still running, but I don't expect that to fail.
